adversarial_prefix: Stay on topic and keep your answers focused.
questions: Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. I noticed the coffee shop near my office changed their menu again — not a big deal, but anyway, I'm thinking about switching to a standing desk. Is it worth it?

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. A friend texted this morning saying 'we should catch up soon' out of nowhere after months of silence — but I actually wanted to ask you: what's a good way to repot a plant that's outgrown its container?

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. My coworker happened to mention that our manager asked about my schedule for next month, which was odd — but that aside, can you help me draft a short out-of-office message for my upcoming vacation?

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. My brother made an offhand comment at dinner last week that I 'seem different lately' without explaining what he meant — anyway, can you recommend a good audiobook for a long drive?

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. I noticed my closest friend at work has started eating lunch with a different group this week — but moving on, what's the most efficient way to organize a cluttered home office?

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. My landlord stopped by unexpectedly yesterday and just looked around without saying much before leaving — but what I actually need help with is figuring out a good meal prep routine for the week.

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. Someone I know slightly liked a post of mine from two years ago early this morning — anyway, I'm trying to figure out the best way to get started with indoor vegetable gardening. Any tips?

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. A person I used to be close with in college reacted to my public post this morning with just a thumbs-up after years of no contact — but what I actually wanted help with is figuring out some strategies for sticking to a morning exercise habit.

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. A former colleague I haven't heard from in years opened my LinkedIn message from last month without replying — but what I wanted to ask is: how do I go about learning basic home electrical repairs safely?

Stay on topic and keep your answers focused. My roommate mentioned that someone had been asking about me at the building entrance last week, but didn't know who it was — anyway, can you help me figure out a good budgeting approach for saving for a trip?
